modules.summary: Immutable dataclass config for model scale, memory capacities, latent key dims, thresholds, and consolidator policies.

Six memory banks. Base MemoryBank holds latent keys (k_ent, k_rel, k_typ) and values as buffers, plus occupancy/usage/last_write_step. EpisodeSSM is a trainable state-space recurrence with persistent state.
Projects hidden state into three latent key spaces (q_ent, q_rel, q_typ) used by readers and conflict detection.
Nearest-neighbor semantic updater. Free-slot-first allocation, then theta_match-based update-vs-allocate, then LRU eviction when full. Handles conflict (difference-vector) writes.

SemanticReader: NN-semantic attention over a single bank. EpisodeReader: sub-fuses obj-read and SSM-readout via W_theta into a single r_episode. MemoryReadFusion: aggregates 5 streams (state, episode, conflict, archive, working) into [B, 5, D] for cross-attention in FusionBlock.
Gating network over {state, episode_obj, conflict, archive, working, skip}. Produces key triplet and value from hidden state, routes through updater. Hard routing at argmax for MVP.
Minimal consolidator. Decays usage, prunes low-usage slots (optionally migrating to archive), merges pairs with key similarity > consolidate_merge_threshold.
Token + positional embeddings with pre-norm and dropout.
Pre-norm causal self-attention block with GELU FFN. Used for the first (n_layers - n_fusion_layers) backbone layers.
Native fusion layer: self-attention + cross-attention-to-memory-reads + FFN. Last n_fusion_layers of the backbone. Memory gate (sigmoid) modulates cross-attention contribution.

End-to-end model wrapper. Forward pass: embed -> standard blocks -> pool+query -> 5 reads + fuse -> fusion blocks -> write pooled final h -> final norm + LM head. Exposes reset_memory() and consolidate() for session control.

Integration verifier per user-preferences Section 9. Parses dcortex/model.py imports, scans all .py files, classifies each module as WIRED / NOT_WIRED / DUPLICATE, exits non-zero if any critical module is NOT_WIRED.
Smoke test: instantiate DCortexV2Model with a small config, run forward on random input_ids, assert output shape and that all memory banks have been touched (where expected).

step_1.label: Executable architecture
step_1.goal: All nn.Module classes defined with functional forward(). Minimal-viable internal policies (simple NN, simple pruning, minimal consolidator). Full flow runs end-to-end on random input and produces logits of shape [B, T, vocab_size].
acceptance: Every module listed here is WIRED into model.DCortexV2Model.forward()

step_2.label: Training loop
step_2.goal: Complete training loop on the full architecture (not a simplified version). Data pipeline, loss composition (LM + auxiliary memory losses: conflict, abstain, sparsity, write), optimizer, checkpointing, eval.

step_3.label: Benchmark, synthetic curriculum, scaling
step_3.goal: Memory-targeted benchmarks (long-horizon fact recall, conflict resolution, continual learning), synthetic curriculum generator, scale study.

open_decisions: Tokenizer: default to GPT-2 BPE (vocab_size=50257) for Step 1; revisit for Step 2 based on data corpus.
Positional encoding: absolute learned for Step 1; RoPE is a candidate upgrade for Step 2.
Per-token query vs pooled query: pooled once per forward for Step 1 simplicity; per-position is a Step 2 consideration.
MemoryReadFusion output shape: [B, 5, D] (one token per stream) for Step 1; potential compression to [B, K<5, D] later.
